creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Hi!
I tried to install gnome3. And got problem.

Due to this change https://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=2234218+0+current/svn-ports-all, security/gpgme should depend on security/gnupg20 too instead of security/gnupg. Now it makes conflict and gnome3 can't be installed.
